markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To introduce mandatory process improvements for all MEs to reduce post-pipeline editing time.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Mandatory Documentation:** Create an `Operating Manual` and `Editorial Checklist` for every account to ensure operational continuity and streamline onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [**Mandatory Conflict Checks:** Use Claude to check all artifacts and assignment directions for internal and cross-document conflicts. This prevents agent loops (e.g., 20-min draft times) and poor-quality output.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [**Simplify Assignment Directions:** Reset assignment directions to a skeletal outline (`H1`/`H2`s) with broad word count ranges. Overly detailed prompts cause agent confusion and long post-pipeline edits.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - **Primary KPI: Time to Delivery:** The core metric is the time from pipeline completion to client-ready state. The golden path goal is **\<15 minutes** per article.

## Topics

### The Problem: Inefficient Pipelines & Long Edits

  - [Post-pipeline editing time is too high, often exceeding two hours.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [This inefficiency stems from agent confusion caused by:](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
      - [**Conflicting Instructions:** Contradictory rules within or between artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
      - [**Overly Detailed Prompts:** Complex assignment directions that agents struggle to interpret.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [**Result:** Agent loops (e.g., 20-min drafts), convoluted content, and high manual effort.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### The Solution: Mandatory Process Improvements

  - [**1. Finalize Documentation**](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [**Operating Manual:** A guide for anyone to operate the account.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
          - [**Contents:** Stakeholders, deliverables, pipelines used, and workflow summaries.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
          - [**Purpose:** Enables seamless coverage for vacations or assistance.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
          - [**Creation Tip:** Use Claude to explain pipeline YAML code for the workflow summaries.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Editorial Checklist:** A pre-delivery checklist of client-specific requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
          - [**Creation Tip:** Feed an existing operating manual to Claude to generate a draft.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [**2. Run Conflict Checks**](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [**Process:** Use a Claude project with full context to identify logic errors.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
          - [**Inputs:** All artifacts, assignment directions, and the pipeline's YAML code.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=3354.0)
          - [**Prime Claude:** Explain the pipeline's purpose and request a conflict pass.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The pipeline's YAML code shows the execution order, helping Claude find sequential conflicts (e.g., a post-processing step that undoes a previous one).](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=3408.0)
  - [**3. Simplify Assignment Directions**](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [**Principle:** Use assignment directions as a directional prompt, not a detailed brief.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
      - [**Action:** Reset to a skeletal outline (`H1`/`H2`s) with broad word count ranges.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
      - [**Test:** For accounts with long edits, try running a topic with blank assignment directions to establish a baseline.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The agentic drafter is designed to fill in the details. Over-specification causes confusion and poor output.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)

### The Goal: Time to Delivery KPI

  - [**Definition:** Time from pipeline completion to client-ready state.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=2454.0)
  - **[Target:](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=2672.0)** **\<15 minutes** per article.
  - [**Method:** Eliminate all repeatable manual steps.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=2613.0)
      - [**Example:** Automate CTA insertion with a dedicated workflow calling an artifact of approved examples.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=2568.0)
  - [**Measurement:** Start self-tracking with a timer; a holistic system is in development.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=2703.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**All MEs:**](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [Create an `Operating Manual` and `Editorial Checklist` for all accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [Run conflict checks on all artifacts and assignment directions using Claude.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [Simplify assignment directions to a skeletal outline and test results.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [**Mariana:**](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=2377.0)
      - [Share the link to the Pod F Claude prompt library.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=2377.0)
  - [**Matthew:**](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
      - [Reschedule this meeting to a more convenient time for all.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
      - [Rename the meeting to "Pipeline Training and Updates."](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
      - [Finalize a holistic system for tracking Time to Delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/v_-q3zs_NApwcJC14aoLjpAsWyEZhGcf?tab=summary&timestamp=2703.0)
